compiled_state.title: Extract utility functions from oversized shell scripts (merge-to-main.sh, validate.sh, validate-review-output.sh)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: merge-to-main.sh (1549 lines), validate.sh (1328 lines), validate-review-output.sh (1050 lines). Extract pure utility functions into lib-*.sh modules. AC: no shell script >1000 lines, all tests pass.

comments.body: AC amendment: Extracted shell utility functions must follow the existing hooks/lib/ flat naming convention (e.g., extract-functions.sh, not lib-extract-functions.sh — the lib-*.sh prefix is NOT used in this project's hooks/lib/). Verify existing convention: ls plugins/dso/hooks/lib/*.sh (shows: config-paths.sh, deps.sh, dispatcher.sh, fuzzy-match.sh, merge-state.sh, etc. — all flat names without lib- prefix).
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

## Testing Mode
GREEN

AC added via sprint orchestrator (original ticket had no AC section).

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] merge-to-main.sh is under 1000 lines after extraction
  Verify: wc -l $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh | awk '$1 < 1000'
- [ ] validate.sh is under 1000 lines after extraction
  Verify: wc -l $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh | awk '$1 < 1000'
- [ ] validate-review-output.sh is under 1000 lines after extraction
  Verify: wc -l $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh | awk '$1 < 1000'
- [ ] Extracted utility functions placed in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/ using flat naming convention (no lib-*.sh prefix)
  Verify: ls $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/*.sh | head -5
- [ ] All shell scripts remain syntactically valid
  Verify: for f in $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh; do bash -n "$f" && echo "OK: $f"; done
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] merge-to-main.sh is under 1000 lines after extraction
  Verify: wc -l $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh | awk '$1 < 1000 {print "OK"; exit 0} {exit 1}'
- [ ] validate.sh is under 1000 lines after extraction
  Verify: wc -l $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh | awk '$1 < 1000 {print "OK"; exit 0} {exit 1}'
- [ ] validate-review-output.sh is under 1000 lines after extraction
  Verify: wc -l $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh | awk '$1 < 1000 {print "OK"; exit 0} {exit 1}'
- [ ] Extracted utilities placed in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/ using flat naming (no lib-*.sh prefix)
  Verify: ls $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/*.sh | wc -l | awk '$1 > 6 {print "OK"; exit 0} {exit 1}'
- [ ] All shell scripts remain syntactically valid
  Verify: bash -n $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh && bash -n $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh && bash -n $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh && echo OK
comments.author: Test
